title: If Condition
description: Write a basic if-else statement to check if a number is positive.
problemStatement:
Make a choice! Given `x <- 10`, write an `if` statement that prints `"Positive"` if `x > 0`. Add an `else` block to print `"Non-positive"`.

**Requirement:** Use curly braces `{}` even for single-line blocks.
hints: R's `if` syntax is very similar to C or Java.
